entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, an organization developing watershed technologies

entities.name: WATERSHED TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies developed for the management and improvement of watersheds

entities.name: FARMER-CENTRIC CONSORTIUM MODEL
entities.description: A holistic model for watershed management based on the 4Cs principles

entities.name: WATERSHED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of organizing and planning the use of land and water resources in a watershed

entities.name: CONVERGENCE
entities.description: One of the 4C principles of the farmer-centric consortium model

entities.name: COLLECTIVE ACTION
entities.description: One of the 4C principles of the farmer-centric consortium model

entities.name: CONSORTIUM
entities.description: One of the 4C principles of the farmer-centric consortium model

entities.name: CO-OPERATION
entities.description: One of the 4C principles of the farmer-centric consortium model

entities.name: COMMUNITY PARTICIPATION
entities.description: The active involvement of the community in watershed management activities

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit area

entities.name: INCOMES
entities.description: Financial earnings of the farmers

entities.name: GREENERY
entities.description: The presence and extent of vegetation in the watershed

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water accessible for use in the watershed

entities.name: SOIL LOSS
entities.description: The removal of the top layer of soil from the land surface

entities.name: RUNOFF
entities.description: The draining away of water from the surface of an area of land

entities.name: CAPACITY BUILDING
entities.description: The process of developing and strengthening the skills and abilities of people

entities.name: SOCIAL CAPITAL
entities.description: The networks of relationships among people who live and work in a particular society
